name: image-extractor
description: Turns image bytes of an asserted format (jpeg/png/webp/avif/tiff/gif/svg/heic/heif/psd) into a single-format (WebP, or JPEG for the PSD embedded-thumbnail path) thumbnail bounded to a fixed box. No filesystem access, no format sniffing, no PSD compositing. { thumbnail, format, width, height, error } out, never throws.
